value.found_quote: Subagents are Markdown files with YAML frontmatter. Store them in different locations depending on scope.
value.rationale: The page describes filesystem-based subagent definitions as Markdown files stored in `.claude/agents/` (project scope) and `~/.claude/agents/` (user scope). The table lists `.claude/agents/` as the current project location and the text states "Subagents are Markdown files with YAML frontmatter." This substantiates the claim of an agents/ directory with markdown-based definitions.
